headline: Why Is CDW (CDW) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
summary: Shares of IT solutions provider CDW (NASDAQGS:CDW) jumped 5.5% in the morning session after Morgan Stanley upgraded the stock to Overweight from Equal Weight, citing unexpectedly strong demand for enterprise servers.

headline: SPS Commerce hires Morgan Stanley to explore sale amid activist push - Reuters
summary: Investing.com -- SPS Commerce Inc (NASDAQ:SPSC) is exploring a potential sale following pressure from activist investors Anson Funds and Irenic Capital, Reuters reported, citing three sources familiar with the matter. According to the report, the company recently tapped Morgan Stanley to assist with the process, which is expected to attract significant interest from private equity firms.

headline: Morgan Stanley (MS) Launches 0.14% Ethereum And Solana ETFs With 95% Staking Rewards
summary: Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) has filed for spot Ethereum and Solana ETFs with a 0.14% management fee. The proposed ETFs return 95% of on-chain staking rewards to shareholders. The launch extends Morgan Stanley’s crypto product lineup beyond bitcoin ETFs. The filings intensify the fee competition among large Wall Street crypto ETF providers. Morgan Stanley is a global financial services company with a large footprint in wealth management, investment banking, and asset management. The move into...

headline: Sony Plans First Dollar-Bond Sale in Nearly Three Decades
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Sony Group Corp. was still marketing the original PlayStation when it last tapped the US investment-grade bond market. Almost three decades later, it’s readying a comeback.
